violations.text: The door to the outside, located in the stairway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to submit evidence of repair to inspector New Violation. Correct By: 07/27/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. Water was turned on to dipping well to flush particulates to the drain. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/27/2025

The ceiling in the basement area was observed with peeling paint and exposed drywall and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to submit evidence of repair to inspector. New Violation. Correct By: 09/27/2025
